mainText:
Step right up to Bank of Entitlement, where your financial whims are our top priority! Take out a loan today and receive a complimentary crown to match your self-proclaimed royal status.

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, there I was, strolling into the Bank of Entitlement for my weekly meeting with the staff. As I entered the marble-floored lobby, adorned with gold-plated pillars, I couldn't help but feel like the king of the world-or at least the king of this bank.I made my way to the meeting room, where my team awaited my arrival with bated breath. As I took my seat at the head of the table, I casually mentioned that I expected each employee to address me as "Your Highness" from now on. The look of disbelief on their faces was priceless, but I knew deep down they understood the hierarchy here at Bank of Entitlement.As the meeting progressed, I casually mentioned that I needed a new company car, not because the current one was faulty, but simply because I felt like a change. The staff exchanged nervous glances, but no one dared to challenge my request. After all, who were they to deny me of what was rightfully mine?Later that day, as I strolled out of the bank with the keys to a brand new luxury car in hand, a sense of satisfaction washed over me. The gasps of envy from bystanders only fueled my belief that I truly deserved every extravagant privilege that came my way.And as I cruised down the boulevard in my new ride, basking in the admiring glances of onlookers, I couldn't help but smirk. In the world of Hot Josh and the Bank of Entitlement, excess is not just a way of life-it's a birthright.
